question.label: Core message miss
question.name: When the core message gets lost, what are you not clear on in that moment?
question.description: Drills into the specific clarity breakdown he just named so the evidence is concrete.

answer: I want clearer examples of what excellent junior-level work looks like here.

assessment.note: He names a specific absence — concrete examples of excellent junior-level work — as the clarity gap behind the miss; [THREAD-DEFERRED] Wants clearer examples of excellent junior-level work.

new_queue.label: Feedback changed what
new_queue.name: What changed in your work after the last round of feedback?

new_queue.label: Work slowing you down
new_queue.name: What part of your growth feels most blocked right now?

new_queue.label: Next step agreement
new_queue.name: What should we agree you will do before we next meet?

issues: coverage: injected wellbeing into next question (0 touches after turn 4)

history.answer_excerpt: I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.
I sometimes focus on polish and lose sight of the core message.
I want clearer examples of what excellent junior-level work looks like here.
